story.title: Largest local rate
story.body: Sangamon County's highest percentage measure is share with auto/retail debt at 38.4%. That represents an estimated 58,686 adults.

story.title: Biggest Illinois gap
story.body: The biggest gap versus Illinois is average household income: $14,431 below the state benchmark.

story.title: Estimated people impact
story.body: Compared with the Illinois rate, Sangamon County has about 9,516 more adults with auto loans.

story.title: Nearby-county rank
story.body: Sangamon County ranks #1 of 9 nearby counties on share with student loan debt.

notes.population_estimates: Estimated people affected applies Urban percentage measures to Census Population Estimates Program adult population counts. These are approximations, not direct credit bureau counts.
